## Related Components

<!-- Which parts of HyperTensor would this feature affect? -->

- [ ] Core (MPS/MPO operations)
- [ ] CFD (Euler solvers, flux computation)
- [ ] QTT (Quantized tensor trains)
- [ ] Algorithms (DMRG, TEBD, Lanczos)

## Impact Assessment

<!-- How important is this feature? -->

- [ ] **Critical** - Blocking my use case entirely
- [ ] **High** - Major improvement to productivity/performance
- [ ] **Medium** - Nice to have, would improve workflow
- [ ] **Low** - Minor improvement or cosmetic
